title: taraxacum acutiusculum
intro: Taraxacum acutiusculum is a perennial dandelion species native to Europe and Asia, commonly known as the needle-leafed dandelion. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum acutiusculum include its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural detoxifier. Taraxacum acutiusculum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
